name: Path Equivalence: 'filename....' (Multiple Trailing Dot)
description: The product does not properly handle filenames with multiple trailing dots, which some operating systems strip during resolution, allowing attackers to bypass access controls that check the dotted form but not the canonical resolved form.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename with multiple trailing dots that bypasses a CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't canonicalize before comparison, while the OS resolves to the base filename without dots at STORAGE[file_access]
